jsonLd.title: Senior Instructional Designer at Meritnation
jsonLd.description:
Meritnation, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Visakhapatnam operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Meritnation:
Meritnation is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Meritnation!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
